name: bench
description: peerBench multi-reviewer gates and read-only bug hunts for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-model code review gates and bug hunts
interface.longDescription: peerBench runs a panel of AI reviewers over plans, code turns, pushes, specs, and manual bug hunts. In Codex it installs a Stop hook that reviews direct Codex work without asking Codex to review itself.
defaultPrompt: Run peerBench setup in this repo.
Use peerBench to review my current changes.
Use peerBench to hunt for bugs in this project.
